title: cartrema minor
intro: Cartrema minor, also known as Spurge laurel or Spurge, is a small evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cartrema minor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as a natural expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. Cartrema minor can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications such as salves and ointments.
